title: [BUG] exceljs on Browser emits TypeError: Cannot read property 'split' of undefined
author: darron1217
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/commit/33b050eaad7a604abcb025787ad09146a1cdde3b#diff-0ec03eab8a78bd1225de2927c0fd8e85
This commit causes error on browser. Accessing to `process` variable causes error.

Lib version: X.Y.Z

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const ws = wb.addWorksheet('XYZ');

ws.getCell('A1').value = 7;
expect(ws.getCell('A1').value).to.equal(7);
```

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->
